message:
Add test reference files for octet-counting edge cases

Add expected output files for three parse_syslog octet-counting
edge case tests that validate RFC 6587 compliance:
- octet_counting_false_with_prefix: numeric prefix with octet_counting=false
- octet_counting_length_mismatch: auto-detect with mismatched length
- octet_counting_zero_length: zero-length prefix (invalid per RFC)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+{
+  x: null,
+}
+warning: `input` is not valid syslog
+ --> tests/functions/parse_syslog/octet_counting_false_with_prefix.tql:4:5
+  |
+4 | x = x.parse_syslog(octet_counting=false)
+  |     ~ 
+  |

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+{
+  x: null,
+}
+warning: `input` is not valid syslog
+ --> tests/functions/parse_syslog/octet_counting_length_mismatch.tql:4:5
+  |
+4 | x = x.parse_syslog()
+  |     ~ 
+  |

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+{
+  x: null,
+}
+warning: `input` is not valid syslog
+ --> tests/functions/parse_syslog/octet_counting_zero_length.tql:3:5
+  |
+3 | x = x.parse_syslog(octet_counting=true)
+  |     ~ 
+  |
